overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a suit walking through a futuristic urban plaza with teal pavement, ascending a ramp alongside traffic, and proceeding along a covered sidewalk beneath elevated highways. The environment features vibrant cyberpunk architecture with orange structural elements, glass towers, and graffiti-covered walls.

distinctive teal colored tile pavement covering the ground

mature trees with green foliage planted in the plaza
large digital billboard mounted on distant building

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bright, open pedestrian plaza with distinctive teal pavement and orange architectural elements. The area is moderately populated with pedestrians walking in various directions, and modern glass towers rise in the background under a clear midday sky.

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open plaza into a partially shaded area under a large concrete building structure. A yellow sports car passes by on the left as the character approaches the start of an ascending ramp, with a glass-enclosed pedestrian bridge visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending pedestrian ramp alongside vehicle traffic with elevated bridge overhead

agents.ego_description: walking up the ramp alongside moving traffic, following other pedestrians

entered.detail: green painted metal barrier separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle road

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a teal-colored ramp that runs parallel to a road with moderate traffic. Green railings separate the pedestrian path from the vehicles, including a red sedan that passes by. Other pedestrians walk ahead, and a glass-enclosed pedestrian bridge spans overhead while futuristic towers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing under concrete overpass with traffic signals

events.description: entering deep shadow under the concrete overpass structure
crossing the street at crosswalk under the overpass with pedestrian group

agents.ego_description: crossing the street under the overpass with a group of pedestrians, following the traffic signal

traffic signal showing green light for pedestrians

industrial vents emitting white steam on the left side of the street
complex multi-story building with balconies and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character enters a deeply shaded area under a massive concrete overpass, crossing a street at a marked crosswalk. The lighting shifts dramatically to low light as the character follows a group of pedestrians across while steam vents emit white vapor on the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway with graffiti art

concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
yellow and black striped construction barriers along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk completely covered by an elevated highway overhead. The left side features a concrete wall covered in extensive graffiti art, where some people are sitting. The lighting is mixed with shadows and patches of light, and traffic continues to move on the road to the right while pedestrians walk in both directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open urban plaza into the deep shadows of a subterranean-like highway corridor. It begins in a sunlit pedestrian area with teal pavement and orange architectural accents, moving past glass towers and crowds under a clear midday sky. As the character leaves the open square, the scene shifts into partial shade beneath a concrete structure where a yellow sports car speeds by, leading the camera up a teal ramp parallel to a road of flowing traffic. The environment then plunges into low light as the character crosses a street beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing through plumes of white vapor from street vents. Finally, the path narrows into a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, where the bright city light is replaced by mixed shadows and concrete walls layered in extensive graffiti.
